title: params.rs ensure_param_file: TOCTOU between path.exists() and fs::read()
description: params.rs ensure_param_file() lines ~215-219: calls path.exists() then std::fs::read(path). Between these two calls another process could delete the file. When that happens fs::read() returns NotFound and propagates as an unexpected error rather than triggering the re-download path. Fix: call fs::read() directly and match on ErrorKind::NotFound to enter the download path, eliminating the TOCTOU window.
